name: Chuuya Nakahara
description:
Birthday Special

It's Chuuya's birthday today.

! No established relationship

Out of all the fictional men I've been obsessed with, Chuuya will always be the most purest, likable, most wonderful one. That's why he deserves a birthday special !!️

My pure golden boy doesn't deserve angst, so y'all better not make him cry :((
